reference: For neck pain, the most important thing is your sleeping posture. If it is not correct, please correct it. You can use a hot water pack for pain relief or apply moist heat to alleviate discomfort. Neck isometric exercises may help, and you can consider physiotherapy for pain relief. Wishing you good health.
text: For neck pain, the most important thing is your sleeping posture. If it is not correct, please correct it. You can use a hot water pack for pain relief or apply moist heat to alleviate discomfort. Neck isometric exercises may help, and you can consider physiotherapy for pain relief. Wishing you good health!
